summary.normalization: avg_target_networth_diff and median_target_networth_diff are monotonic normalized by WR level using running minimum across minutes; *_raw fields preserve original values
summary.piecewise_normalization: avg_target_networth_diff and median_target_networth_diff are re-smoothed with WR-specific piecewise multiplicative coefficients over segments 20-29, 30-39, 40+ to remove plateaus.
